/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_ir_tests.dir/unit/compiler/ir/identity_visitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_ir_tests.dir/unit/compiler/ir/mangling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_ir_tests.dir/unit/compiler/ir/typed_hir_instance.cpp.o -o ahfl_compiler_ir_tests  ../src/compiler/handoff/libahfl_compiler_handoff.a ../src/compiler/ir/libahfl_compiler_ir.a ../src/compiler/semantics/libahfl_compiler_semantics.a ../src/compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../src/compiler/syntax/parser/libahfl_compiler_syntax_parser.a ../third_party/antlr4/libantlr4_runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation ../src/base/json/libahfl_base_json.a
